page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.n1.7xlarge is a compute-optimized instance built on the KVM hypervisor. It features 32 dedicated physical cores powered by an Intel Xeon 8163 processor running at 2.5 GHz. The system architecture is x86_64, configured with 64.0 GB of system memory, yielding a resource density of 2.0 GB of RAM per core. This instance does not include local storage or integrated GPU hardware.

Performance benchmarks indicate a clear distinction between single-core and multi-core capabilities. Single-core processing is relatively weak, as shown by stress-ng single-core and gzip compression tests, which fall into the bottom 25% and 10% respectively. However, multi-core performance scales to average levels, with stress-ng multi-core and bzip3 multi-threaded decompression reaching mid-tier performance. Memory bandwidth remains stable at average levels, with read-only large block speeds at 88.67 GB/sec and write speeds at 47.18 GB/sec, though PassMark memory scores are positioned in the lower 25%.

From a qualitative cost-efficiency perspective, the ecs.n1.7xlarge offers a high density of dedicated physical cores without hyperthreading, making it suitable for parallelizable workloads that do not require massive per-core memory allocations. Given the average database and Redis SET performance, this instance is suited for multi-threaded applications, static web serving, and distributed compute tasks that can leverage the 32 dedicated cores while tolerating lower single-core execution speeds.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.n1.7xlarge is an x86_64 compute-optimized instance featuring 32 dedicated physical cores powered by an Intel Xeon 8163 processor at 2.5 GHz. Equipped with 64.0 GB of RAM, it provides a 1:2 vCPU-to-memory ratio and contains no local storage or GPU accelerators. Under benchmark testing, the instance exhibits weak single-core performance, but scales to average levels in multi-threaded workloads, such as stress-ng multi-core and bzip3 decompression. Memory bandwidth remains average, with large-block read speeds of 88.67 GB/sec. This hardware profile makes the ecs.n1.7xlarge qualitatively cost-effective for parallelized, multi-threaded tasks, static web serving, and mid-range database operations that benefit from dedicated physical cores rather than high single-thread speed.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.n1.7xlarge is a compute-optimized instance with 32 dedicated Intel Xeon cores, 64 GB RAM, and no local storage, delivering average multi-core performance for parallelized workloads.

tagline: A dedicated 32-core compute-optimized platform designed for parallelized multi-threaded workloads and mid-range database operations without local storage.
bullet_points: 32 dedicated physical Intel Xeon 8163 cores at 2.5 GHz
64.0 GB of system memory (2.0 GB per core)
No local storage or GPU accelerators included
Average multi-core performance and memory bandwidth
Suited for parallelized workloads, static web serving, and database operations
